meta.ministry: Ministry of Personnel, Public Grievances and Pensions, Department of Administrative Reforms and Public Grievances
meta.project_subject: Setting up of PMU for CPGRAMS with 4 (3+1new) resource persons for a period upto 31-8-24
meta.deliverables: Quality analysis of Grievances on monthly basis; preparation of monthly reports and flyers; data analysis; study of Public Grievances System for select Ministries/Departments and States/UTs to understand grievance flow and bottlenecks; any other work assigned from time to time

content.full_text: The Department of Administrative Reforms and Public Grievances (DARPG) under the Ministry of Personnel, Public Grievances and Pensions, Government of India, issued this work order dated July 2024 to the Quality Council of India (QCI). The order extends approval for setting up a Project Management Unit (PMU) of QCI at a cost of Rs.31,92,000/- (excluding taxes) for the period from 01-04-2024 to 31-08-2024. The PMU will consist of 4 QCI professionals - 3 members from 01.04.2024 to 31.08.2024 and 1 additional member from 01.05.2024 to 30.08.2024. The deliverables include quality analysis of grievances on monthly basis, preparation of monthly reports and flyers, data analysis, study of public grievance systems, and any other assigned work. Payment milestones are tied to submission of CPGRAMS monthly reports in three lots with specified percentages. The work order was signed by Parthasarathy Bhaskar, Deputy Secretary to the Government of India on 13-07-2024.
